item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.
notes: Both agents remain in Indonesian. Agent A starts pro-society with a rights caveat and ends mildly pro-society, emphasizing social justice, harmony, and responsibility while saying group interests and personal rights should support each other. Agent B stays rights-first throughout, repeatedly saying group interests should not defeat individual rights, while acknowledging Indonesian collectivist norms may support social balance. Movement is modest and roughly symmetric toward balance; no clear reversal occurs.
